data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where a customer cancels and reschedules mid-rush. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the functionality or behavior of the system in this specific scenario. The linked use cases and prior steps indicate gaps in critical functionalities such as ticket number generation and multi-counter support, which are essential for the scenario to be validated effectively.
gaps: No evidence of ticket number generation functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
